description: Brock Services, LLC, known as Brock Group, is an American company engaged in providing multi-craft specialty services for industrial and commercial sectors. The company offers services such as scaffold material rental, shop facilities, field services, project management, construction, maintenance, turnaround projects, and specialized services including scaffolding, insulation, painting, abatement, fireproofing, shoring, facilities maintenance, fabrication, general mechanical services, technical services, and safety services. Brock Group serves a wide range of industries, including oil and gas, petrochemical, power generation, LNG, offshore, heavy manufacturing, food processing, pipelines and transmission, nuclear, pulp and paper, and pharmaceuticals, with operations across the United States and Canada.

description: Tutor Perini Corporation is an American construction company engaged in civil, building, and specialty construction services. The company provides general contracting, project management, engineering, equipment manufacturing, federal prime contracting, green building, remote construction, self-performed services, surety services, and virtual design and construction. Tutor Perini serves a wide range of markets, including aviation, infrastructure, commercial, education, government and military, healthcare, hospitality and gaming, justice, manufacturing and industrial, mixed-use and retail, public assembly and entertainment, rail and mass transit, recovery and restoration, residential, science and technology, sports, tunnels and mines, and water. The company is a member of the National Association of Construction Managers (NACM) and the American Institute of Constructors (AIC).
qualification_reasoning: Tutor Perini is a construction company that provides a wide range of construction services, including general contracting, project management, and engineering, which aligns with the query for construction companies, and its membership in construction-related associations further supports its core identity as a construction company.
